report.summary: New redeployment live (Dkt9eF3dQ, 33m ago, 4m 15s build) with 1 new page.tsx confirmed; no new commits this cycle, all 6 API routes healthy, persistent carry-overs unchanged, Vercel trial now ~7 days out.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: Page audit: 401 slugs in published-pages.ts (up 1 from v8), 297 have page.tsx files (up 1), 104 remain backlog placeholders — 1 new page confirmed present this cycle, no regressions

TypeScript errors hold at 42 across same 2 files: src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX/template syntax) and src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx — non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts
No new git commits in this cycle window — last commit cb65a9d (Day 42 publish) remains unchanged; zero new regressions introduced
Local build continues to OOM in VM as expected — Vercel cloud builds stable and current

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: All 6 public API routes confirmed present and correctly structured: /api/prices (CoinGecko, 60s TTL), /api/trending (CoinGecko, 5min TTL), /api/fear-greed (Alternative.me, 10min TTL), /api/market-dominance (CoinGecko, 5min TTL), /api/market-metrics (CoinGecko + Alternative.me, 60s TTL), /api/defi-yields (DefiLlama, 5min TTL)

Fallback data coverage: only 2/6 routes have hardcoded fallback (prices, market-dominance) — trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, and defi-yields will return 500 on upstream failure with no graceful degradation
Cache headers and stale-while-revalidate patterns verified intact across all routes — freshness ladder operational
PERSISTENT ISSUE: Rate limiting remains 0/6 routes — no checkRateLimit calls detected in any public API route; /api/prices and /api/trending remain highest abuse risk
No rate limit hits or stale data incidents detected this cycle

sections.title: DevOps & Deployment
items: NEW deployment this cycle: Dkt9eF3dQ — Status: Ready (Current), build time 4m 15s, triggered 33 minutes ago as a manual redeploy of HmWMpiP7u
Deployment chain healthy: 15+ consecutive successful Production builds today, zero failures — build times stable in 4m 10s–4m 56s range
Vercel platform status: All systems normal (confirmed via vercel-status.com live check)
ALERT: Vercel Pro trial expiring approximately March 24–25 (~7 days) — Jefe must add payment method at vercel.com/account/billing before then to prevent production interruption
No error spikes, performance regressions, or manual intervention required this cycle

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped this cycle: 1 new page.tsx scaffold confirmed (297 total vs 296 prior), plus a fresh manual redeploy (Dkt9eF3dQ) — otherwise an idle code cycle

Carry-overs (unchanged from prior cycles): Fix TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts and crypto-index-funds-guide page; add fallback data to 4 API routes missing it (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields); add rate limiting to at least /api/prices and /api/trending; continue scaffolding 104 backlog page.tsx stubs
BLOCKER FOR JEFE: Vercel billing — add payment method before ~March 25 to avoid production downtime. No code change needed, only account action required.
No cross-skill dependencies blocking active work — content pipeline and publishing queue both clear to resume on next active cycle
